cards.back: Refers to the systematic error or prejudice in an AI system that can lead to unfair outcomes or decisions
The process of designing and implementing policies and procedures for the collection, storage, and use of data in AI systems
A design approach that prioritizes the needs, values, and experiences of humans, particularly vulnerable or underrepresented groups
The practice of identifying, explaining, and justifying the decision-making processes of AI systems to ensure transparency and fairness
An evaluation of the potential social consequences of an AI system or project, considering its effects on society, economy, and environment
